calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:05am (829777 & 829779) 829777
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Stephen Bull, appears through counsel, Robin James. Respondent, Weston Spiro (829777)as does Respondent Natalie Leal.

Respondent Mr. Spiro and Ms. Leal inform the Court that they has an attorney who is running late. The Respondents ask the Court for a recess until their attorney can arrive. Both matters are related to the same vehicle accident,and will be heard together by Judge Renne.

10:20am
Charles Swain, esq. appears to represent the Respondents in both matters (829777 & 829779). Mr. Swain lodges 1. Respondent's & Plaintiff's notice of motion and motion for legal fees 2. Respondents' & plaintiffs' CCP998 Offer to compromise to to defendant Stephen Bull and to his attorney of record. Both matters are called but case 829779 is heard first. With case number 829777: Mr. Swain calls Mr. Spiro, previously sworn, as a witness.
EXHA(A) Accident report
EXHR(1) Medical report.
After cross examination by Ms. James, re-direct by Mr. Swan, and questions from Judge Renne, the case is submitted.
12:30pm
Both matters are submitted. Evidence from the Small Claims Appeal is retained under file #829777.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-24-2009 Judgment Entered
